items.title: Regular passenger train services on Karaikal-Peralam BG line to start from May 20
items.summary: A passenger reservation counter at the newly constructed Thirunallar station to be opened; passengers train services being resumed on the stretch after about 40 years

items.title: Is the UK's once favourite car coming back as an EV?
items.summary: The company has announced plans to build seven new models in Europe including a small electric hatchback.

items.title: Millions Recovered in FIFA Corruption Scandal May Now Be Missing Again Before World Cup
items.summary: Ahead of the World Cup, the head of South American soccer faces an ethics complaint he received payments recovered from a 2015 investigation that shook global soccer.
